strategy_definitions.A_Sprinter: Minimal-location play: locks to hollow, brews starter ingredient continuously, buys machine #2 first, hires all workers. Zero exploration; pure throughput.
strategy_definitions.B_Completionist: Unlocks locations cheapest-first, spreads all workers across the full map, rotates machines onto unseen recipes. Token spend prioritises slots for wider recipe access.
strategy_definitions.C_Industrialist: Builds all 5 machines as fast as possible. Assigns 40% of workers as auto-clickers. Ignores quests. Token spend: clicker power then brew speed.
strategy_definitions.D_QuestHunter: Bootstraps discovery (Completionist) until quests unlock, then pivots every machine/worker toward the cheapest-by-quantity active quest. Sells only non-quest potions.
strategy_definitions.E_AchievementHunter: Chases mach_5 (250k coins), work_8 (100k), loc_30 (5 tokens). Aggressively rotates recipes for disc_* rewards. Watches for volatile ingredients to attempt the secret voidsoup brew. Token spend: slots first (variety) then auto-clicker speed (secret_clickspeed).
strategy_definitions.F_Everyman: Every 10 in-game minutes, rolls for a mode using the game's own seeded RNG: ~40% gold-max (Sprinter), ~25% explorer (Completionist), ~20% quester (if quests active), ~15% achiever (if within 20% of a threshold). The same RNG drives ingredient drops, so mode switches correlate with current supply — creating emergent, unique-per-run playstyles within a consistent framework.

featured_runs.label: Standout run
featured_runs.story: Machine #2 at 0m. Simple-recipe throughput compounded quickly, reaching 1k — specialised depth beating exploration breadth here.

featured_runs.label: Tough run
featured_runs.story: Machine #2 delayed to 0m due to early coin pressure. Single-location focus left no ingredient variance; 100% machine utilisation with no quest income brought in only 1k.

featured_runs.label: Standout run
featured_runs.story: Predominantly gold-maximiser (33% of mode rolls). This run outperformed the strategy median by 0% — a clear demonstration that RNG mode selection creates distinct emergent trajectories within the same player archetype.

featured_runs.label: Tough run
featured_runs.story: Mode scatter with no dominant playstyle: 0% gold / 83% explore / 17% quests / 0% achieve. Without a committed focus, this run earned only 1k — 15% below the strategy median.

featured_runs.label: Standout run
featured_runs.story: All 5 machines online at 99% average utilisation — maximum factory throughput, earning 4k.

featured_runs.label: Tough run
featured_runs.story: Machine utilisation a low 99% — ingredient supply couldn't keep cauldrons fed. Factory-first approach left throughput potential unrealised, capping output at 4k.

featured_runs.label: Standout run
featured_runs.story: 15 potions discovered with 10 locations unlocked; the variety pipeline drove consistent quest generation and 2 achievements en route to 2k.

featured_runs.label: Tough run
featured_runs.story: Bottom-10% run: 1k coins. Machine utilisation 97%, 0 quests. RNG adversity compounded through 24 hours.

featured_runs.label: Standout run
featured_runs.story: Top performer: 83 coins, 5 potions, 2 quests, 1 achievements.

featured_runs.label: Tough run
featured_runs.story: Bottom-10% run: 31 coins. Machine utilisation 100%, 1 quests. RNG adversity compounded through 24 hours.

featured_runs.label: Standout run
featured_runs.story: Achievement blitz — 2 milestones unlocked, first at 23m, earning 4k bonus coins (278% of total income from achievement rewards alone).

featured_runs.label: Tough run
featured_runs.story: Slow discovery stalled high-value rewards: only 15 potions found, blocking the disc_50 (8k) and disc_150 (80k) payouts. Achievement total: 2 — well below average. Ingredient variety limited breakthrough timing.

recipe_analysis.note: Achievable potions from real ingredient combinations. Enumerates all distinct 1-3 ingredient recipes, single-ingredient repeats 2-5x, and distinct 4-ingredient recipes among the 30 highest-value ingredients.
